allow: Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''''''''; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{ const v=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(v.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\(''''2.''''\)\).join\(''''\\n''''\)\); }\)")
